faqs.question: What spider species are most common in East Harlem apartments?
faqs.answer: East Harlem residents typically encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, and occasionally brown recluse or black widow spiders in older buildings. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection and tailor treatment accordingly to ensure complete elimination and prevention.
